tools.name: list_project_files
tools.description: List bounded read-only project files under an allowed root.

tools.name: search_project_files
tools.description: Search bounded read-only project text under an allowed root.

tools.name: read_project_file
tools.description: Read a bounded slice of a project-local text file.

tools.name: run_python_script
tools.description: Run a project-local Python script with cwd, env, timeout, and output controls.

tools.name: ask_user_question
tools.description: Return a pending human question payload for later HITL integration.

error_result.message: Path resolves outside the project root or does not exist
